assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md: 'Affected version range: versions prior to the fix (imprecise -- no specific threshold given), Fixed version: see advisory (imprecise -- no specific version given)' and 'Note on imprecise data: The Jira description does not provide a specific fix threshold. The affected versions field says "versions prior to the fix" and the fixed version says "see advisory."'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md: '1. MITRE CVE API: Query: https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901. Extracted data: Affected range: lessThan 0.4.8 (semver), Fix threshold: 0.4.8'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md: '2. OSV.dev API: Query: https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901. Extracted data: Fixed: 0.4.8, Fix threshold: 0.4.8'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: enrichment.md: '3. Cross-Validation: Result: Agreement. Both MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev report the same fix threshold: 0.4.8. Enriched fix threshold: 0.4.8 (authoritative value for Step 2.3 comparisons). This enriched threshold replaces the imprecise Jira description data ("versions prior to the fix") for all subsequent version impact analysis.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md: 'Fix Threshold Source: Using enriched fix threshold from Step 1.5: h2 < 0.4.8 (from MITRE CVE API and OSV.dev cross-validation). The imprecise Jira description data ("versions prior to the fix") is NOT used for version comparisons.' and 'Step 2.3 Comparison Method: Step 2.3 used the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data.'
